entries.original: Added persisted `/goal` workflows with app-server APIs, model tools, runtime continuation, and TUI controls for create, pause, resume, and clear. (#18073, #18074, #18075, #18076, #18077, #20082)
entries.translated: `max_concurrent_threads_per_session`에 대한 별칭 지정

entries.original: Added `codex update`, configurable TUI keymaps, plan-mode nudges, action-required terminal titles, and active-turn `/statusline` and `/title` edits. (#19933, #18593, #19901, #18372, #19917)
entries.translated: `spawn` 설명에 멀티 에이전트 스레드 제한 표시

entries.original: Expanded permission profiles with built-in defaults, sandbox CLI profile selection, cwd controls, and active-profile metadata for clients. (#19900, #20117, #20118, #20095)
entries.translated: 중단 마커를 위한 `agents.interrupt_message` 추가

entries.original: Improved plugin workflows with marketplace installation, remote bundle caching, remote uninstall, plugin-bundled hooks, hook enablement state, and external-agent config import. (#18704, #19914, #19456, #19705, #19840, #19949)
entries.translated: 턴 전환 또는 중단 시 멈춤 현상 수정

entries.original: Added external agent session import, including background imports and imported-session title handling. (#19895, #20284, #20261)
entries.translated: Morpheus에서 MCP 플러그인 및 앱 제거

entries.original: Made MultiAgentV2 configuration more explicit with thread caps, wait-time controls, root/subagent hints, and v2-specific depth handling. (#19360, #19792, #19805, #20052, #20180)
entries.translated: 플러그인 비활성화를 위한 워크스페이스 옵션 준수

entries.original: Fixed several resume and interruption issues, including stale interrupt hangs, persisted provider restoration, large remote resume responses, and slow filtered resume lists. (#18392, #19287, #19920, #19591)
entries.translated: 네임드 파이프 컨슈머의 PID 확인

entries.original: Improved TUI reliability around terminal resize reflow, markdown list spacing, slash-command popup layout, keyboard cleanup, shell-mode escape, and working status updates. (#18575, #19706, #19511, #19625, #19986, #19939)
entries.translated: GPT-5.5를 위한 번들 OpenAI Docs 스킬 업데이트

entries.original: Hardened managed network behavior for deferred denials, proxy bypass defaults, resolved target checks, IPv6 host matching, and `git -C` approval handling. (#19184, #20002, #19999, #19995, #20085)
entries.translated: 패키지 관리자 설치 정책 강화

entries.original: Fixed Windows sandbox and PTY edge cases, including pseudoconsole startup, elevated runner process handling, core shell environment inheritance, and named-pipe validation. (#20042, #19211, #20089, #19283)
entries.translated: Bedrock 모델에 `apply_patch` 함수 도구 사용

entries.original: Fixed Bedrock model support for `apply_patch`, GPT-5.4 reasoning levels, and updated Bedrock GPT-5.4 endpoint/model metadata. (#19416, #19461, #20109)
entries.translated: [codex] 스레드 시작 알림에서 포크 턴 제외

entries.original: Fixed MCP/plugin edge cases around stdio server cleanup, plugin MCP approval persistence, and custom MCP metadata isolation. (#19753, #19537, #19836, #19875)
entries.translated: WebSocket 업그레이드를 사용하도록 유닉스 소켓 전송 업데이트

entries.original: Updated the bundled OpenAI Docs skill for GPT-5.5, `gpt-image-2`, and clearer upgrade guidance. (#19407, #19443, #19422)
entries.translated: 선택 메뉴 번호 매기기 및 기본 포커스에서 비활성화된 행 제외

entries.original: Clarified contributor-facing docs, including the PR template, Rust async trait guidance, and README wording. (#19912, #20242, #19514)
entries.translated: 레거시 프로필 변환 시 `cwd` 의존

entries.original: Added a checked-in `codex-core` public API listing and a ThreadManager sample crate. (#20243, #20141)
entries.translated: Added a checked-in `codex-core` public API listing and a ThreadManager sample crate. (#20243, #20141)

entries.original: Published `codex-app-server` release artifacts, stopped publishing GNU Linux binaries, and increased release workflow timeouts. (#19447, #19445, #20271, #20343)
entries.translated: Published `codex-app-server` release artifacts, stopped publishing GNU Linux binaries, and increased release workflow timeouts. (#19447, #19445, #20271, #20343)
